official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official empty Play clientbound update_recipes body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns update_recipes to packet id 0x85.
The generated fixture uses an empty itemSets map and SelectableRecipe.SingleInputSet.empty().
The official body writes two zero counts and does not enter item, recipe display, recipe property set, or recipe payload codecs.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded counts, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove recipe, item, display, registry, or client-load behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer non-empty recipe, item, display, registry, or client-load behavior.
